scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_054 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The function calls provided should resolve the OpenSCAP finding related to restricting exposed kernel pointer addresses access by setting the kernel.kptr_restrict parameter and verifying the change through a scan.
